title: Dependant's Protection Scheme (DPS)
text:
Dependant's Protection Scheme (DPS) - SupportGoWhere
Dependant's Protection Scheme (DPS)
Share link
Term life insurance scheme, solely administered by Great Eastern Life that provides basic financial protection for you and your family in the event of death, terminal illness or total permanent disability.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Provides cash payout to get through the first few years should the insured member meet an untimely death, suffer from terminal illness or total permanent disability
Processing of claim application generally takes 7 working days upon the Great Eastern Life's receipt of requested documents
Collapse all sections
About this support

Insured CPF Members up to age 60

Maximum sum assured of up to $70,000



Insured CPF Members above age 60 and up to age 65

Maximum sum assured of up to $55,000

Who is this for?

Automatic inclusion of DPS coverage for Singapore Citizen or Permanent Resident between age 21 and 65 upon a valid CPF working contribution.

DPS claim payout is made to:

Next-of-kin/DPS nominee of policyholder who is deceased, or

DPS policyholder who is certified by a registered medical practitioner under the Medical Registration Act to be suffering from:

Terminal illness: an illness that is likely to result in the death of the insured CPF member within 12 months

Total permanent disability: the inability to take part in any employment permanently, or the total permanent loss of physical functions of any of the following:

Both eyes, or

Two limbs, or

One eye and one limb

How to apply?

For CPF members between age 16 and 65 and have not been automatically covered by DPS, you can apply to join DPS with Great Eastern Life directly.




Claim on death grounds

Next-of-kins/DPS nominee of policyholder can contact Great Eastern Life directly for details of claim application forms and supporting documents required.




Claim on medical grounds

DPS and either Home Protection Scheme (HPS) or withdraw CPF due to reduced life expectancy, or both: 

Submit your application to the CPF Board directly via the CPF website. The claim application for DPS will be forwarded to Great Eastern Life for their concurrent assessment. 

DPS only:

Contact Great Eastern Life directly for details of claim application forms and supporting documents required.

Where can I find help?

View more details

CPF Hotline: 1800-227-1188

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Write to us

Visit your nearest branch
Note: By appointment only

Scheme last updated 10 Mar 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
